name: Buttered Rum Pound Cake with Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter; gradually beat in 2 1/2 cups sugar.
2. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda; add to creamed mixture alternately with sour cream, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Stir in vanilla extract and lemon extract.
4. Beat egg whites until foamy; gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until stiff peaks form. Fold into batter.
5. Pour batter into a well-greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan 10-15 minutes, then remove from pan and place on serving plate.
8. While warm, prick cake surface at one-inch intervals with a wooden pick.
9. Pour warm glaze over cake. Let cake stand several hours or overnight before serving.
Buttered Rum Glaze:
1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons butter
3 tablespoons rum
3/4 cup sugar
3 tablespoons water
1/2 cup chopped walnuts
Combine first 4 ingredients in a small saucepan; bring to a boil. Boil mixture, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in nuts. Glaze cake.
